title: Activate the control system, consolidate the plan, and prepare the first blind-isolated parallel build wave
applicability_note: CTRL requirements (applicability.task_ids=[M0-T024]) are covered and independently verified at the M0-T024 consolidation gate. PROD requirements (applicability.task_ids=[M3-T001,M4-T007,M2-T017]) are covered by each first-wave producer packet and verified at that packet's own gate. POST requirements (applicability.task_ids=[M0-T024-POSTMERGE], a non-ledger sentinel) match no ledger task, so they never block acceptance; they are post-merge controller obligations discharged after the consolidation merges and evidenced in the final owner summary + repository state (two-lane principle, D-001-R118).

owner_approval.decision: Complete this directive as one continuous controller run; #97 merge authorized under Section 1 identity match.
authorizes: accept + merge PR #97 (Section 1 identities verified to match)
capture D-002; create the M0-T024 control-consolidation task + branch from post-#97 main
contract the first-wave producer packets (M3-T001, M4-T007, M2-T017) and build the first-wave integration contract
create one sibling worktree + branch per approved producer AFTER the consolidation PR is accepted+merged
prohibits: launching product producers / dispatching build agents in the controller tab
opening a fourth (auth/RLS) producer whose acceptance is blocked by B-001
closing any stale PR whose unique material changes remain unresolved
deploying, purchasing, installing dependencies, or releasing any hold

notes: D-002 is owner-issued (channel owner_message); 'active' reflects owner issuance, not AI self-activation.
CTRL/PROD requirements block their task's acceptance via per-task verification; POST requirements are recorded provenance discharged by the controller after merge (two-lane principle).
final_reviewed_sha / final_reviewed_manifest_sha256 are populated when M0-T024's independent directive re-gate records PASS at the frozen consolidation identity.

audit_log.note: Captured D-002 verbatim (source-001.md, sha256 aead44b8) at frozen post-#97 baseline 2d44b47; decomposed 69 atomic requirements (40 CTRL / 14 PROD / 15 POST).
PR #97 accepted + merged under Section 1 (identities verified: head 9bc1f13, reviewed ed8a6776, manifest 9ab6c960, evidence/control-only, CI+directive-verification green). merge commit 2d44b47.
